# Classic Environment V2

@dynatrace-sdk/client-classic-environment-v2

## 5.2.3

### Patch Changes

- Revert: Fix redundant undefined or optional properties in model types. (APPDEV-7583) (APPDEV-16631)

## 5.2.2

### Patch Changes

- Update description for `getCredentialsDetails`. (APPDEV-16448)

## 5.2.1

### Patch Changes

- Fix redundant undefined or optional properties in model types. (APPDEV-7583)
- Make origin optional in outage handling settings.

## 5.2.0

### Minor Changes

- Add `bulkDelete` method to the `metricsClient`.

## 5.1.0

### Minor Changes

- Added SDK for endpoint returning a list of detailed credentials sets for Synthetic monitors.

## 5.0.0

- Introduced Browser Monitor support in synthetic Monitors REST API v2. (DEM-15266)
- Added `SyntheticBrowserMonitorRequest` and `SyntheticBrowserMonitorResponse`.
- [breaking change] For on-demand execution REST API `SyntheticOnDemandTriggeringProblemDetailsDto.executionId` and `SyntheticOnDemandExecutionDto.nextExecutionId` were changed from `long` to `string` to fix rounding number problem. (DEM-12092)
- Introduced `fipsMode` field in `SyntheticPrivateLocationUpdateDto` and `SyntheticPrivateLocationDto`. (DEM-11275)

## 4.2.1

### Patch Changes

- Fix transformations for date format strings. (APPDEV-14400)
- Update dependencies. (APPDEV-14014)
- Update dependencies. (APPDEV-13611)

## 4.2.0

- Added new `rumManualInsertionTagsRead` scope
- Added new `GetJavaScriptTagQueryScriptExecutionAttribute` enum
- Added new `GetOneAgentJavaScriptTagQueryScriptExecutionAttribute` enum
- Added new `GetOneAgentJavaScriptTagWithSriQueryScriptExecutionAttribute` enum
- Deprecated `deleteSecurityContext` and `setSecurityContext` in `MonitoredEntitiesClient`
- Added new `RumManualInsertionTagsClient` class and exported `rumManualInsertionTagsClient` instance

## 4.1.0

• Added new `process_group_pgr_group_update_suppressed` state to `MonitoredEntityStates` and `MonitoredEntityStatesSeverity`
• Added new content types to `storeLog` method in `LogsClient`

## 4.0.0

- Intefrace `SyntheticMultiProtocolMonitorUpdateDtoType` renamed to `SyntheticMultiProtocolMonitorRequestType`
- Interface `SyntheticMultiProtocolMonitorUpdateDto` renamed to `SyntheticMultiProtocolMonitorRequest`
- Interface `SyntheticMultiProtocolMonitorDtoType` renamed to `SyntheticMultiProtocolMonitorResponseType`
- Interface `SyntheticMultiProtocolMonitorDto` renamed to `SyntheticMultiProtocolMonitorResponse`
- Improved synthetic monitoring performance threshold definitions
- Added `fipsMode` property to the `ActiveGate` interface
- Added `PPCLE` enum value to `osArchitecture` in `ActiveGate`
- Updated extension status models and added `extension-status-with-id-dto`

## 3.7.3

### Patch Changes

- Update JSDoc examples. (APPDEV-13187)
- Update dependencies. (APPDEV-11813)

## 3.7.2

### Patch Changes

- Improve performance of date transformations. (APPDEV-12840)

## 3.7.1

### Patch Changes

- Improve performance of payload transformations. (APPDEV-12840)
- Remove generatedAt property from metadata file. (APPDEV-12696)

## 3.7.0

### Minor Changes

- Fix `getPermissions` operation success response to return proper `AccessorPermissionsList` type instead of `AccessorPermissionsList[]` in **SettingsObjectsAPI**
- Add new `DEBUGGING` value to `ActiveGateModule.type` enum
- Add new optional fields (`description`, `displayName`, `isRecommended`) to the `FeatureSetDetails` model
- Add new optional `browserExecutionSupported` field to the `PrivateSyntheticLocation` and `SyntheticPrivateLocationUpdate` models
- Made `targetList` field optional in `SyntheticMultiProtocolMonitorStepDto`
- Add support for optional transformations. (APPDEV-11914)

### Patch Changes

- Add fix for 'transformToFormDataField' function. (APPDEV-12478)

## 3.6.8

Updated required scopes for `getMonitors` operation and minor documentation updates.

## 3.6.7

### Patch Changes

- Add `REORDER` enum value to `AuditLogEntryEventType` enum
- Add `deploymentType` and `lastModificationTimestamp` fields to `LocationCollectionElement` type
- Add `source` field to `RevisionDiff` type
- Update method descriptions

## 3.6.6

### Patch Changes

- Fix date-time format serialization. (APPDEV-11661)

## 3.6.5

### Bugfixes

- Include _appId_ in `RevisionDiff`
- Update docs of `EventIngest` and `EventIngestProperties` models

## 3.6.4

### Bugfixes

- Update model description of `LogMessageJson`
- Update possible values for the `type` property of `AssetInfoDto`

## 3.6.3

### Patch Changes

- Replace model transformations with single transformation function. (APPDEV-10818)

## 3.6.2

### Bugfixes

- Update `RevisionDiff` model
- Update JSDoc comments

## 3.6.1

### Bugfixes

- Update JSDoc comments.

## 3.6.0

### Features

- Add operations for access control on settings values in **SettingsObjectsClient**. (PS-22766)
- Add `isContainerized` parameter to the _getNodes_ method of **SyntheticLocationsNodesAndConfigurationClient**.

### Bugfixes

- Redundant error serializers are removed. (APPDEV-10272)
- Missing await added for API Gateway handler and line breaks at the end of the string are ignored. (APPDEV-10883)
- Fixed incorrect type rendered for arrays of enum values. (APPDEV-10701)

## 3.5.0

### Features

- New client **AccessTokensAgentTokensClient**
- `getLocation` of **SyntheticLocationsNodesAndConfigurationClient** can now resolve with **PrivateSyntheticLocation**

## 3.4.0

### Minor Changes

- Enums are replaced with unions of literals. APPDEV-10338
- Inline enums as union of literals. APPDEV-9924

## 3.3.2

### Bugfixes

- `entityId` in `SynthethicLocation` is no longer required

## 3.3.1

### Patch Changes

- AWS Role and Key based credentials type added.

## 3.3.0

### Features

- Export errors from the package.

## 3.2.1

Spec file has been update to include SNMPV3Credentials.

## 3.2.0

### Features

- Add _ActiveGatesActiveGateGroupsClient_
- Add timeframe config to `getStates` in _MonitoredEntitiesMonitoringStateClient_
- Add `rerun` to `SyntheticOnDemandMonitorExecutionsClient`
- Add owner info to settings objects in `SettingsObjectsClient`

## 3.1.0

### Minor Changes

- Introduced @dynatrace-sdk/shared-errors package and improved response errors handling.

## 3.0.0

> ⚠️ **Breaking changes:**
>
> - Rename `addFields` to `fields` query param in `getSettingsHistory` request in **SettingsObjectsAPI**

### Features

- Add `resolveEffectivePermissions` to **SettingsObjectsAPI**
- Add capability data to locations in the `SyntheticLocations` model
- Add k8s context to the `Problem` model
- Use structural type-guards for errors

## 2.1.0

### Features

- Add `getSettingsHistory` to **SettingsObjectsAPI**
- Add `managementZoneFilter` config option to `getSecurityProblem` in **SecurityProblemsAPI**

## 2.0.0

> ⚠️ **Breaking changes:**
>
> - `active` field was renamed to `enabled` in the `SyntheticMultiProtocolMonitorDto` and `SyntheticMultiProtocolMonitorUpdateDto`
> - Removed enum values in `AuditLogEntryCategory` and `AuditLogEntryEventType`
> - `getSettingsObjectByObjectId` now returns the `SettingsObjectByObjectIdResponse` interface instead of `SettingsObject`
> - `getAvailableSchemaDefinitions` of the `SettingsSchemasClient` now accepts the config object as an argument

### Features

- Added new `SettingsManagementZonesClient` client
- Added new `SettingsPrivacyOperationsSyncApiClient` client
- Enable filtering by capability in the `getLocations` method of the `SyntheticLocationsNodesAndConfigurationClient`
- Enable filtering fields returned from the `getAvailableSchemaDefinitions` method of the `SettingsSchemasClient`
- Add `exectionId` to the `SyntheticOnDemandTriggeringProblemDetails`

## 1.13.2

### Patch Changes

- Updated boolean serialization handling. APPDEV-9047

## 1.13.1

### Patch Changes

- Fix broken links in the readme file.

## 1.13.0

### Minor Changes

- update classic-environment-v2 to include remediationDescription for security problems

## 1.12.0

### Minor Changes

- Provide actual error code in the error message instead of wildcard. APPDEV-7744
- Improvements of errors handling
- Added skipAsyncValidation optional parameter in Constraint model
- Fixed typos:
  `getLocationDemploymentApplyCommands` to `getLocationDeploymentApplyCommands`
  `getLocationDemploymentDeleteCommands` to `getLocationDeploymentDeleteCommands`
  `getLocationDemploymentYaml` to `getLocationDeploymentYaml`
  `getScreenDefinitionSchema` to `getEntityScreenDefinitionSchema`

### Patch Changes

- Do not print empty fields in the default message of an error. APPDEV-7630
- Update documentation. APPDEV-8154

## 1.11.1

### Patch Changes

- Sanitize links in the documentation
- Add API reference to the readme file

## 1.11.0

### Minor changes

- Add `uiBased` query param to the `pushCustomDevice` method of the `monitoredEntitiesClient`
- Add `validateOnly` query param to the `putSettingsObjectByObjectId` method of the `settingsObjectsClient`

### Patch Changes

- Prevent empty entity selector in the `setSecurityContext` method of the `monitoredEntitiesClient`
- Fix typings for arbitrary type schemas
- Fix error handling in `ingest` method of the `businessEventsClient`
- Fix error handling in `getExecution` method of the `syntheticOnDemandMonitorExecutionsClient`
- Remove deprecated credential scopes
- Update http-client

## 1.10.0

### Minor Changes

- Add new client `AttacksClient`
- Add `setSecurityContext` and `deleteSecurityContext` methods to the `MonitoredEntitesClient`
- Support binary format in `listSchemaFiles` and `extensionDetails` methods of `Extensions_2_0Client`

### Patch Changes

- Fix typings for models using Record type
- Fix handling of error responses in some methods
- Update documentation

## 1.9.1

### Patch Changes

- Add `monitorSelector` query param in `getMonitors` method of the `syntheticNetworkAvailabilityMonitorsClient`
- Add `activeVersion` property to the `ExtensionInfo` model
- Add `namExecutionSupported` property to the synthetic location models

## 1.9.0

### Minor Changes

- Add 4XX and 5XX response handling

## 1.8.2

### Patch Changes

- Update documentation.

## 1.8.1

### Patch Changes

- Use `Record` type instead of `any` for free-form objects where applicable.

## 1.8.0

### Minor Changes

- Add `executeExtensionMonitoringConfigurationActions` to Extensions client.

## 1.7.0

### Minor Changes

- Add `syntheticMultiProtocolMonitorsClient`.
- Fix `SecurityProblemDetails` schema.

### Patch Changes

- Remove redundant `UnifiedAnalysisClient`. Use `@dynatrace-sdk/client-unified-analysis` instead.

## 1.6.2

### Patch Changes

- Fixed a bug that caused abort errors from http-client to be wrapped in ApiClientError('UnexpectedError').

## 1.6.1

### Patch Changes

- Update dependencies.

## 1.6.0

### Minor Changes

- Add geo data to synthetic location models.

### Patch Changes

- Fixed a bug that caused internal http-client errors to be thrown for error responses.

## 1.5.0

### Minor Changes

- Add Unified Analysis API client
- Add `listExtensionInfos` and `installExtension` methods to Extensions 2.0 client

### Patch Changes

- Remove required status of a deprecated `scope` param in `createCredentials` method of the `credentialVaultClient`.

## 1.4.2

### Patch Changes

- Update JSDoc examples.

## 1.4.1

### Patch Changes

- EF20. List of ActiveGate Groups

## 1.4.0

### Minor Changes

- Add external tracking link references to Third-party vulnerability remediation items.

### Minor Changes

- Add synthethic nodes and locations

### Patch Changes

- Fix transformation of null values for nullable properties
